plugins.name: pm-gates
plugins.description: PM governance layer for autonomous build loops: gated pipeline from brainstorm through browser-verified deploy — cited market-scan with a wedge verdict, clickable-prototype triad approval, dependency-ordered story decomposition with a GitHub Projects view, an append-only decision ledger that keeps specs honest across pivots, scale-adaptive routing, pre-handoff first-run verification, stored test/eval evidence, and human hard stops at irreversible actions.
